user.title: Add Smarthome Module
user.description: Configure a single Smarthome module (hub). Each module can have relay lights and/or button inputs.

data_description.module_id: Numeric ID of the module, as configured on the hardware.
data_description.relay_count: How many relay-controlled lights this module has (0 if none).
data_description.button_count: How many physical button inputs this module has (0 if none).
data_description.value_template: Jinja2 template applied to every incoming MQTT payload. Use {{ value }} to pass the payload through unchanged.

error.invalid_module_id: Module ID must be a non-negative integer.
error.no_entities: At least one of relay count or button count must be greater than 0.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please check your entries.

user.title: Button-to-Relay Mapping
user.description: Define which relay lights are toggled when a button is pressed. Keys are button indices, values are relay indices (single integer) or a list of relay indices.

error.invalid_yaml: Invalid YAML format. Please check the syntax.
error.not_a_dict: Mapping must be a YAML dictionary (key: value pairs).
